subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Our presence, and from it We perceived the fragrance of thy love for thy Lord, the Most High, the Most Great. We beseech God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا کتابک و وجدنا منه رایحه حبک ربک العلی العظیم و نسئل الله بان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
